/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC --coverage -O3 -pedantic -g -D __FILENAME__='"$$(subst  /home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/DW_Decomp/,,$$(abspath $$<))"' -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libDwDecompd.so -o libDwDecompd.so CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/DW_Decomp.cpp.o   -L/home/igor/gurobi1000/linux64/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/igor/gurobi1000/linux64/lib: -lgurobi_c++ -lgurobi
